summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Command Center feature - a full-screen war room display combining live event feed, VIP alerts, jackpot tickers, device health map, and financial summaries. All major functionality working correctly including real-time WebSocket updates.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests: 86/86 endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Command Center page loads at /command-center with full-screen layout
KPI strip displays all 6 cards: Devices (85), Active Alerts (23), Coin In ($32,335), JP Liability ($1,271,373), Events (1902), Active Players (1)
Device Health Map shows 85 devices in color-coded grid layout
Event Volume (24h) area chart with severity distribution bars
Live Event Feed receives real-time WebSocket events (verified event count increased from 26 to 27)
Progressive Jackpots section shows 6 jackpots with progress bars and amounts
VIP Player Alerts section displays Diamond/Platinum tier alerts with proper badges
Active Sessions section shows 1 currently active player session
Alert Ticker at bottom scrolls active alerts using Marquee component
Exit button successfully navigates back to main dashboard
LIVE indicator shows WebSocket connection status and live event count
Real-time clock displays current UTC time
Command Center appears in sidebar navigation with Monitor icon
Full-screen layout confirmed - no sidebar/header visible in Command Center
WebSocket connection working - LIVE indicator shows 'LIVE | 3 events'
Navigation between dashboard and Command Center works seamlessly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (86/86 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all Command Center features working)
